codeReview.summary: The blocking issue from the prior synthesis has been fixed. CoderAgent.execute() now properly uses the LLM backend when available (lines 1713-1770), falling back to heuristic generation only when no LLM is configured. The llm field is properly utilized via Optional<Arc<dyn LlmBackend>> and the chat() method is called correctly with proper prompt formatting and JSON response parsing.

issues.description: LlmConfig uses stop_sequences: None, but some LLM backends may expect an empty Vec. Consider using Some(vec![]) instead for consistency across backends.
edit_file result is ignored with `let _ = ...`. This silently swallows errors from file edit operations. Consider logging or propagating errors for better debugging.

summary: The blocking issue is FIXED. CoderAgent.execute() now properly uses the LLM backend when available, with proper fallback to heuristic generation. The llm field is no longer ignored. All 174 tests pass including 5 new CoderAgent tests.
